title: Manage Routing with Gateway API
description: Manage Routing with Gateway API documents gateway material for Gateway API in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an entity page for the gateway-api class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Istio Gateway, Cilium Gateway with L2 Announcements, and fixed LoadBalancer IP assignment, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include gateway, istio, cilium, l2-announcements, gateway-api, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / gateway-api / gateway, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
